title: After the Arima Kinen: And So the Wind Blows

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(There might be tons of Umamusume out there
who are stronger than me...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And there might be tons of Umamusume whose
running is even more eye-catching than mine...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (I know that nobody's more passionate about running than I am! Because...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I love running! I really love it! I love it more than the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That was some nice running.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And you may have beat me with that running! But
don't go thinking I'm just gonna throw in the
towel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're mine next time. This is just the beginning
of our rivalry, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heh. Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But first, some praise. You ran phenomenally.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And it looks like the crowd agrees.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES! INEEES!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Ahaha! C'mon everyone, you're going
overboard here... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your support!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone, did your dreams come true
today? As for me...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I feel like all my dreams just came true at once!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I had so much fun. Every second I spent running
was just... bliss.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Thank you, thank you, thank you!
